positive: Minimalist abstract depiction of a rising sun over a stylized, mountainous landscape silhouette. The scene must use clean geometric shapes and strong black lines contrasted against a vibrant gradient background of soft peach, sky blue, and deep indigo. The composition should be centered, with the sun represented by a perfect circle casting soft, radial gradients. Use a clean, vector-art style with crisp edges, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Ensure maximum contrast and visual balance. High detail, clean lines, professional graphic design.
negative: blurry, watermark, text, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, logo, copyright, gradients too soft, messy, grainy
